rationale: The citing paper is a meta-analysis that synthesizes partitioned-pricing research and tests moderator mechanisms (including contextual/benefit-related factors), and the cited 2008 JMR paper directly develops a mechanism about perceived component benefit and component-level price sensitivity within partitioned prices. Given this strong topical and theoretical overlap in the same literature stream, this citation is plausibly a substantive theory/mechanism source rather than an incidental mention.
